Off Calendar Sep-18-2025 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-02-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BORNSTEIN SEAFOODS INC.'s Motion For Order To Vacate Default Judgment.

Plaintiff Bornstein Seafoods Inc.'s unopposed Motion For Order To Vacate Default Judgment is GRANTED.

Plaintiff moves under Code of Civil Procedure section 187. "When jurisdiction is, by the Constitution or this Code, or by any other statute, conferred on a Court or judicial officer, all the means necessary to carry it into effect are also given; and in the exercise of this jurisdiction, if the course of proceeding be not specifically pointed out by this Code or the statute, any suitable process or mode of proceeding may be adopted which may appear most conformable to the spirit of this Code."

Good cause appearing, the judgment entered in this case on December 20, 20204, is ordered vacated and the matter is returned to the trial calendar.

Counsel for Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
